title: 6-Pack Artificial Orchid Flowers 9 Large Petals 37 Inch Faux Phalaenopsis Silk Bouquets Real Touch Yellow Fake Orchids for Home/Wedding/Christmas/Party/Garden Office
features: [Multipurpose Use] - Our silk orchid flowers have various applications. They can be used for home, office, store, garden, centerpieces, hotels, parties, festivals, celebrations, and other occasions. It was also suitable for parties, birthday celebrations, or wedding dinners to set the atmosphere

[Durable Real Touch Orchids] - Fake phalaenopsis flowers that look real are made of plastic and silk material, durable for years, have vibrant colors, and remain vivid. Gives you a real silky touch and a natural realistic look
[Size & Package] - 54 large heads on 6 bouquets in total. Each Yellow faux orchid stem is 55 cm/21.65 Inch; the flower diameter is 9/11 cm-3.54/4.33 Inch; the overall height is 94 cm/37.01 Inch

[Functional Desgin] - These charming artificial orchid plants are bendable and durable for long use, with no maintenance or watering needed. Their appearance will stay beautiful even a few years later, and they will remain fresh and lively all the time
[ATTENTION] - Because of the light, the color and size will be slightly wrong.
